description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named deploy that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow has two jobs: pypi and ghpages, both running on ubuntu-latest. The pypi job checks out the code, sets up Python 3.11, installs dependencies, builds the package, and publishes it to PyPI. It also creates a GitHub release with changelog information. The ghpages job checks out two repositories, sets up Python 3.11, installs dependencies, builds the documentation, and publishes it to GitHub Pages.
